factions.territory_role: Core Sol security, inner-system patrols, naval shipyards, anti-piracy operations.

visual_identity.prompt_prefix: United Commonwealth of Earth Navy hard-surface spacecraft, disciplined naval military design, angular slab armor, broad flat panels, wedge bow, symmetrical hull, graphite gray and naval white plating, dark blue accent lights, clean low-poly game-ready placeholder, sharp bevels, planar geometry

factions.territory_role: Deep breakaway polity with contested approaches, defended colony worlds, and independent navy doctrine.
factions.design_note: TRAPPIST-1 is selected as a gameplay/narrative anchor because it is deeper than the immediate Solar neighborhood and supports multi-world territory control fiction.

factions.territory_role: Raiders, smugglers, hijackers, and scavenger groups operating along weakly patrolled routes.
